# Boldpiq — Web Design & Development Agency

> Boldpiq crafts high-performance websites and graphics that captivate audiences and drive business growth for ambitious brands across South Africa and beyond.

## About

Boldpiq is a South African web design and development agency specialising in custom website design, Next.js development, brand identity, e-commerce, and GEO-optimised digital experiences. We build websites that attract, convert, and retain customers — engineered for businesses that refuse to blend in.

## Core Services

- **Web Design** — Award-worthy UI/UX designs built in Figma with motion design and responsive layouts
- **Web Development** — Fast, secure Next.js websites optimised for Core Web Vitals, AI search (GEO), and conversion
- **Brand Identity** — Visual systems that command attention: logo, typography, colour, and full brand guidelines
- **E-Commerce Development** — Custom Shopify and headless commerce solutions
- **Digital Marketing** — Email, SMS, paid ads, and social media campaigns via GHL CRM

- [Home](https://www.boldpiq.com/) — Overview of services, work, and process

- [About](https://www.boldpiq.com/about) — Agency story and team
- [Contact / Book Discovery Call](https://www.boldpiq.com/contact) — Free 30-minute discovery call booking
- [Book 45-Min Appointment](https://www.boldpiq.com/contact45min) — 45-minute strategy session for clients
- [Refund Policy](https://www.boldpiq.com/refund) — Refund and cancellation terms

## Location & Coverage

- Based in South Africa
- Services: South Africa, Western Cape, Cape Town, Johannesburg, Pretoria — and international clients
- Remote-first agency
